Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Reviewing Large Changes with Jujutsu 75 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. Human Organ Atlas 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Why Are Viral Capsids Icosahedral? 56 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. Canada's bill C-22 mandates mass metadata surveillance 912 upvotes, 287 comments
  5. MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security 320 upvotes, 102 comments
  6. Bringing Semiconductors to Kazakhstan 26 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant 111 upvotes, 34 comments
  8. Stop Sloppypasta 542 upvotes, 214 comments
  9. Chrome DevTools MCP (2025) 543 upvotes, 216 comments
  10. Six ingenious ways how Canon DSLRs used to illuminate their autofocus points 100 upvotes, 33 comments
  11. The 49MB web page 729 upvotes, 315 comments
  12. Home Assistant waters my plants 167 upvotes, 65 comments
  13. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 428 upvotes, 189 comments
  14. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 57 upvotes, 18 comments
  15. I Love FreeBSD 124 upvotes, 50 comments
  16. Comparing Python Type Checkers: Typing Spec Conformance 43 upvotes, 15 comments
  17. US Job Market Visualizer – Andrej Karpathy 64 upvotes, 26 comments
  18. Autoresearch Hub 54 upvotes, 21 comments
  19. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 741 upvotes, 448 comments
  20. Even Faster Asin() Was Staring Right at Me 53 upvotes, 23 comments
  21. Obsession with growth is destroying nature, 150 countries warn 162 upvotes, 99 comments
  22. 'Pokémon Go' players unknowingly trained delivery robots with 30B images 84 upvotes, 47 comments
  23. Event Publisher enables event integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  25. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. Show HN: Hackerbrief – Top posts on Hacker News summarized daily 43 upvotes, 28 comments
  27. How I write software with LLMs 389 upvotes, 367 comments
  28. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. MCP Server Is Eating Your Context Window. There's a Simpler Way 38 upvotes, 42 comments
  30. Nango (YC W23, API Access for Agents and Apps) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
